headline_findings.model_change_from_original: 4th model added: Triad Service Agent (Shield/Lex/Sage). Aria reclassified from Yoda-Govern to new Model 1 (Dual-Principal — Angie primary, Yoda tech oversight).

governance_models.name: Dual-Principal
governance_models.rationale: Angie is Aria's primary principal, not Yoda. Misclassifying as Yoda-Govern risks Yoda overriding Angie on business-stream decisions.

governance_models.name: Triad Service Agent
governance_models.rationale: Shield/Lex/Sage are reactive gates, not actor-agents. No cadence. Invoked on demand. Verdict-returning only. Treating as Undefined undersells their role and leaves invocation criteria undocumented.

recommended_chgs.title: Formalise Triad Invocation Criteria
recommended_chgs.action: Add invocation trigger matrix + conflict resolution rule to Yoda's RULES.md

recommended_chgs.title: Operationalise Specialist Agents
recommended_chgs.action: Add routing decision tree, approval workflows, handoff protocols, and sequence enforcement to Yoda's RULES.md

recommended_chgs.title: Update Aria Governance Classification
recommended_chgs.action: Update MEMORY.md and AI_GOVERNANCE_FRAMEWORK_v1.0.md to reflect Aria as Model 1 (Dual-Principal). Define Yoda's oversight scope as technical-only.

recommended_chgs.title: Confirm Warden Monitoring Scope
recommended_chgs.action: Decide: enrol specialist agents in model-policy.json OR document explicit exclusion. Fix inconsistent agent count in MEMORY.md.

recommended_chgs.title: Add Governance Policy Template to Build Process
recommended_chgs.action: Publish Section 5 checklist as mandatory pre-activation gate. Add to RULES.md.

recommended_chgs.title: Verify Aria Shared Context Files
recommended_chgs.action: Verify context-for-aria.md, yoda-daily-brief.md, aria-daily-brief.md, relay-to-ken.json are present and active.

recommended_chgs.title: Define Krennic Build Scope
recommended_chgs.action: Pre-build prep: SLO targets, runbook templates, workspace-sre/ structure. Ready before trigger fires.

atlas_note: I have produced this framework as DRAFT FOR REVIEW only. I do not implement. All CHG-P1 through CHG-P7 must be raised and executed by Yoda after Ken approval.
